ddls:
CREATE TABLE "state_employment_displacement" (
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the state by jobs displaced as a share of total employment */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "net_jobs_displaced" INTEGER /* Net number of jobs displaced */,
  "state_employment" INTEGER /* Total state employment */,
  "displacement_share" REAL /* Jobs displaced as a share of state employment */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the displacement data is recorded */,
  "automation_impact_score" REAL /* Impact score specifically for automation */,
  "globalization_impact_score" REAL /* Impact score specifically for globalization */,
  "total_impact_score" REAL /* Combined impact score of all factors */,
  "mitigation_strategies" TEXT /* Ongoing or planned mitigation strategies for job displacement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_employment_displacement_state_name FOREIGN KEY ("state_name") REFERENCES state_employment ("state_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_employment" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "employment_year" INTEGER /* Year for which employment data is recorded */,
  "total_employment" INTEGER /* Total employment in the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the state */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "employment_year")
)

CREATE TABLE "displacement_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each displacement factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the factor */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the factor */,
  "long_term_impact" TEXT /* Long-term impact of the factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "displacement_data" (
  "displacement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each displacement data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the displacement factor */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Score representing the impact of the factor on job displacement */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the displacement data is recorded */,
  "mitigation_effort" TEXT /* Mitigation efforts related to the factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("displacement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_displacement_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_employment ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_displacement_data_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES displacement_factors ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the indicator is recorded */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of economic indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_employment ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the job category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job category */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of jobs in the category */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary for jobs in the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affected_jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job affected by displacement */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job category */,
  "displaced_jobs" INTEGER /* Number of jobs displaced in the category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the job displacement data is recorded */,
  "retraining_programs" TEXT /* Retraining programs available for displaced workers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affected_jobs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affected_jobs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_employment ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy intervention */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy intervention */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the intervention was implemented */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the intervention */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* Impact assessment of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_interventions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_employment ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research study */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "research_institute" TEXT /* Name of the research institute conducting the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_studies_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_employment ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stakeholder */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the stakeholder */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the stakeholder */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization the stakeholder belongs to */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the stakeholder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholder_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder engagement */,
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stakeholder */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy intervention */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study */,
  "engagement_level" TEXT /* Level of engagement (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of engagement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stakeholder_engagement_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stakeholder_engagement_stakeholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("stakeholder_id") REFERENCES stakeholders ("stakeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stakeholder_engagement_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES policy_interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report author */,
  "impact_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the impact of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES stakeholders ("stakeholder_id")
)
